name: second-brain
description: LLM-maintained knowledge wiki for your Obsidian vault. Instead of re-deriving knowledge from raw sources via RAG on every query, the LLM incrementally compiles knowledge into a persistent, cross-linked wiki of markdown files. Supports ingest (source → wiki), query (synthesize with citations), lint (broken links / orphans / contradictions), note (discrete topical file), brain-dump (timestamped journal), and kanban task management. Vault path is configurable via the SECOND_BRAIN_VAULT environment variable. Triggers on English and Vietnamese phrasings.
